item.description:
# LocaRec 0.3.41
## Changes since build-40-d1465dc
- Make the install queue tests independent of which models are installed (6635866) - Write up the 0.3.5 changes (03a168a) - Let the tab buttons queue jobs and keep finished transcripts from re-running (cb735f1) - Add tests for the install queue and launch reconciliation (c14fc96) - Drop a deleted recording's queued jobs (500f42f) - Add an Activity panel for the download and processing queues (356c3b7) - Show queued recordings and allow stacking jobs across recordings (54617b8) - Harden the processing queue guards for empty transcripts and mixed jobs (ed89f7b) - Queue model installs and processing jobs instead of dropping them (2dc179f) - Let a running model download be cancelled (8bcc2d9) - Add UserDefaults keys for the install and processing queues (2f6eb17) - Add the task-by-task plan for the install and processing queues (3f18b8a) - Add the design for queued model installs and processing (75c103e)
Build: 41 Commit: 6635866
